Business: Regency Ceramics Limited manufactures and sells ceramic floor and wall tiles in India. It offers glazed vitrified, parking, and heavy-duty tiles for high traffic areas; and GVT, polished vitrified, matt finish, cool roof, tac, full body, double charge tiles, as well as provides steps and risers.
